resources.string:
"This service allows the use of custom shade by sliding down from the top of the screen. No data is stored on the device or sent over the internet. Usages are explained below.
Permissions:
- Observe your actions: Receives a response from the system when the top of the screen is touched to trigger the shade.
- Retrieve window content: Required for automatic clicking of some settings after the user chooses they want to toggle them in the app-provided interface"
"The app was not able to find where the ACCESSIBILITY permission is located on your device. Please try to manually search for this in your phone's settings and enable it."
"Unfortunately the Accessibility settings didn't open. Please open manually."
No Activity found to handle this feature

"It looks like the app was killed by the system.
If this happens often, please use the provided Wallpaper to keep it in memory, or lock it in the recent apps."
It can expose you to risks. Please uninstall it and install from a trusted source.
Since Android 12 the app requires BLUETOOTH permission to be able control it from the notification shade
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we may share this data with the following partners to allow them to serve personalized ads or content:
As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we may share this data with the following partners to help measure performance and improve our products and services:

"Allowing us and/or our partners to use this data for personalized ads and content and other purposes, as described in our Privacy Policy:
• Gives you a more personalized experience, ads, and content
• Helps support product improvements and developments
• Allows you to participate in promotions"
Giving you a more personal experience, including personalized ads and content
Helping support product improvements and developments
Allowing you to participate in promotions
Thank you for downloading our App! Allowing us and our partners to use this data helps us create a unique App experience, including by:

You can always change your selections later. If you choose not to share your data, you will still be able to access the App and you will still receive ads. However, those ads may be less relevant to your interests.

"As explained in our Privacy Policy, with your consent, we collect certain information concerning your device, such as IP address and advertising identifiers. This data allows us and our partners to serve personalized ads and content and make improvements.
Below you can choose to allow us and/or our partners to use this data for the following purposes:"
I am over the age of sixteen, accept the Terms of Use, and acknowledge the Privacy Policy applies.
I certify that I am over the age of sixteen and that I have read and understood the Privacy Policy.
Help us keep %s free and more fun for you!
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.

"The process of blurring content requires the content to be known. And the only way to know what to blur behind the panel is through screen recording. This doesn't run continuously, only captures 1 frame when you drop down the panel.
If it causes issues or lag on your device (on lock screen usually), please don't use it.
A cast icon may appear in the status bar.
When prompted, please allow screen recording."
"Can't toggle Wi-fi at the moment. Please do it manually. Airplane mode should be off."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Automatically connected via network rating provider

"This app requires Accessibility service, in order for the following features to function properly:
• Observe your actions: Receives a response from the system when the top of the screen is touched to trigger the shade
• Retrieve window content: Required for automatic clicking of some settings after the user chooses they want to toggle them in the app-provided interface
We do not collect or share any sensitive or private information."

"If you don't use Chrome you can skip this. The Chrome browser may switch automatically to a minimal tab list UI while this app is running. To keep the full tab list with thumbnails, make sure to turn Off the \"Simplified view for open tabs\" option, located under
Chrome Settings > Accessibility"

"Set the details for each item to how they appear in you system shade.
Changes are saved automatically."

"Unfortunately, starting Android 9 there is a restriction that doesn't allow apps to get the Wifi Name if Location permission is not granted and Location is not turned on.
So if you want the Wifi Network Name to be shown in the shade you need to allow the permission.
You can skip this step and \"Wi-Fi\" will be used as the name."

"Sadly a system-level permission is needed to disable system heads-up notifications. It can be granted using ADB with the command below:
"
Notifications paused by Do Not Disturb
Hold and drag to add tiles
Hides notification content and prevents sensitive tiles to be clicked.
Hold and drag to rearrange tiles

"Image Assets from the Intro Screen - Freepik.com
Copyright 2013 Philip Schiffer Copyright © 2019 The Android Open Source Project Copyright © 2019 Google Inc. Icons in main menu from Flaticon.com, authors srip, Freepik and Eucalyp; The following changes have been made to the software provided in the pie-release branch from platform_frameworks_base_SystemUI: All these mentioned changes are subjected to new entries. Also soon I'll start looking on those bugs and TODO's that are mentioned (or not mentioned) and will submit GitHub pull-requests. :) Changes to SettingsButton: made it open up MainActivity on TunerClick made it open Settings on Click Changes to ToggleSlider for brightness: implemented it's listener into the holder's service to update the screen brightness making use of WindowManager's LayoutParams and updateViewLayout() Changes to TouchAnimator: used reflection to invoke Path.approximate() on API 21+ and disabled the PathInterpolator altogether on API 19 and lower Changes to NotificationPanelView and StatusBarWindowView: refactored code that uses PhoneStatusBar and PhoneStatusBarView to not use it anymore and transferred current needed methods that were funneled through PhoneStatusBar over to NotificationPanelView (ie: ScrimController and BrightnessMirrorController). Changes to NotificationStackScrollLayout: no significant changes that visually alter the function of the software. Several changes at ExpandableNotificationRow to allow more customization Changed BroadcastReceiver in DateView to lister for ACTION_DATE_CHANGED Added a check for null QsTile.State in setIcon(). Added customization of the PanelView's background color. Added preference to customize number of columns Added custom made tiles that use the current public APIs to toggle whatever settings are changeable. Added customization of the PanelView's background color. Will also work on: Tint of the foreground elements (ie: imageviews, textview,..) Added a preference to choose the number of qquick tiles from the app's settings. Added customization of the ToggleSlider's brightness color. Added option for the user to choose a pic from storage inside app's settings and use that as MultiUserSwitch ImageView's source Added fallbacks for lower API levels."
"In order to connect to WIFI networks, you need to grant location permissions. The location only accessed for that purpose and won't be saved or tracked."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
"You're a brand new user. Here's a limited discount for you! 🎁🎁"
Not available on this Android version.
p.license { background:grey; } body { font-family: sans-serif; overflow-wrap: break-word; } pre { background-color: #eeeeee; padding: 1em; white-space: pre-wrap; }
Gets your attention with sound or vibration.
Helps you focus without sound or vibration.
This group of notifications cannot be configured here
Notification permission is required to display notifications
Notification permission is required to display notifications. Please go to device settings and grant notification permission
Mi Control Center: show custom notifications
"Notification service activity not found. Please grant permission manually"
The system refused to show us notifications. Please restart the phone to fix this.
Allow app to send you notifications?
View the ad you saved when you were offline
"You'll get a notification with the link when you're back online"
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Optional, not all devices have these:
To make sure that the app work as expected please enable override system panel from app extras
Have a problem in notification panel?
"The app was not able to find where the WRITE_SETTINGS permission is located on your device. Please try to manually search for this in your phone's settings and enable it."
Permission needed to change this setting
The following permissions are required to run the app:
This application needs permissions to work correctly.
Disable these permissions to turn the service off:
"Tell us what changes you'd like to see, or bugs you've discovered."
Make a request to delete your account.
Tap to customize your ad experience and enjoy tailored content based on your interests.
Do you like this app? Please support it with 5 stars.
Remove all ads within the app.
Do you want to share this app with your friends?
"Subscription is billed after the trial ends and will auto-renew. You can cancel your subscription anytime before your trial ends to avoid charges."
By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy policies
Drag added toggles to rearrange them
Let us know by leaving a 5 star rating
Would you like to rate the app?
"We are working hard for a better user experience. We'd greatly appreciate if you can rate us"
This will reset all your colors to the default ones.
"Tap backup to restore. Long press to delete"
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy policies
Permission not granted for screen blur
"Unfortunately, screen recording isn't supported on your device."
Something went wrong loading Profile Picture
Storage permission is required to pick and crop images
If this is disabled the slider will have a circular thumb
Maximum allowed notifications in a group (default of 8)
Sets size of the quick setting and its icon
Makes the quick tiles section square
Split colors according to system dark theme.
Color shown over the content behind the panel (has transparency adjustment)
You can also you this to create your own themes and switch them up.
Blurs the background of the panel.
Colorizes the small app name card with the notification color
Choose an image from your gallery as the background for quick settings
Choose a custom text to be displayed in place of the carrier name.
Remove the small app name card over the status bar and show it in the notification
Colorize all notifications background with their respective color
Enable only if you experience brightness issues while switching apps or unlocking the device.
Show styled pop-up (peek) notifications at the top of the screen.
"Don't change to manual when adjusting brightness. This may cause issues on some devices."
Use logarithmic brightness slider values from Android 9+ which spreads the values more evenly on the slider, instead of having most values in the lower half.
Disable the top black gradient and shift the content down
Helps showing the app instead of the system.

This method is optional. By default the app tries to stop system notifications from popping up, but may fail at times. Use this to achieve perfect results. *Remember to turn this back off if you uninstall the app.
Use \"Active tile color\" for the inside icon
Can have weird effect on some devices
Turns the icon red when this amount is exceeded
Useful to keep the app in memory for some devices.
By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy policies
Please find the %s tile in your system shade (on 1st or 2nd page) then click it one time.
Please assign the position from your Control Center
"Running in background Some phones are set to aggressively kill apps running in the background. If it causes issues with this app, please check below how to solve it."
"Running in background 2 If the above method didn't work, try using the Wallpaper from Extras."
"Running in background 3 If the above method didn't work, try to open your recent apps, long press on this app and lock it."
"Live blur This option can cause issues with unlocking on some devices."

"Swipe from home screen Changing the swipe down gesture on the home screen requires a custom launcher. You can reassign the gesture to open this app, from the Shortcuts tab.
In case you use the system launcher, you can still enable an Edge Trigger for this."
Show auto brightness next to the slider
Show time and date in Control Center
Centered notification actions (like reply, mark as read)
Integrate media players in quick settings
Show X symbol on signal when mobile data is off
Use slide animation when swiping between panels
To preview the triggers, start the app service
Android 10 gestures may cause conflicts. Increasing trigger size can help.
For side triggers, you have to swipe Downwards.
You can configure your swipe area how you want.
You can swipe in the empty space, or near the edges of the screen to switch between panels.
"Unfortunately something didn't work. Please try again or contact the developer."

"
For Vivo Control Center, the Position is right-to-left."
Wallpaper picker failed to open. Please choose %s Wallpaper manually.
Choose another wallpaper to disable this feature
Wallpaper service used to open the shade when swiping down on home screen.

"Location permission is needed to allow showing your Wifi networks even when the app is closed or not in use. This is needed because Wifi is categorized as location-sensitive data. Click here to enable."
Not connected due to low quality network
needs permission to change some system settings.
Если закрыть рекламу до окончания таймера, награда за просмотр не будет начислена

Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто. Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто
Покупка и продажа элитных и дешёвых машин на Авто.ру
Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту
"Unfortunately your device doesn't support this feature."
"Your wallpaper changed. If you want to update %s with the new one, click below"
